---
title: "Neural Networks"
author: "Foo John"
date: "2025-02-02"
description: "Interpreting neural models"
bibliography: ../../assets/publications.bib 
draft: true 
---

## Introduction

@spectrum discovered neural networks.
It is well known [-@spectrum].
Both @spectrum and @simavg argue this.


## Methods

Our work is a descendant of several works on transformers [@graphlearning; @simavg].
This proof is well known [@simavg, Section 3.2]. 

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
